Interface IDividendCalendarFeedConnector

All Known Implementing Classes:
DivvyDiaryDividendCalendar
public interface IDividendCalendarFeedConnector
Interface for dividend calendar feed connectors that retrieve dividend information from external data sources. Implementations provide dividend data for specific ex-dividend dates with support for prioritization and different security identifiers.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static class 
    IDividendCalendarFeedConnector.CalendarDividends
    Data transfer object representing dividend information from a calendar feed.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<IDividendCalendarFeedConnector.CalendarDividends>
    getExDateDividend(LocalDate exDate)
    Retrieves a list of calendar dividends for a specified ex-date.
    int
    getPriority()
    Returns the priority ranking of this split calendar connector.
    boolean
    supportISIN()
    Indicates whether this connector supports ISIN-based security identification.

  • Method Details

    • getExDateDividend

      List<IDividendCalendarFeedConnector.CalendarDividends> getExDateDividend(LocalDate exDate) throws Exception
      Retrieves a list of calendar dividends for a specified ex-date.
      Parameters:
      exDate - the ex-date for which to retrieve dividends, specified as a LocalDate.
      Returns:
      a list of IDividendCalendarFeedConnector.CalendarDividends objects representing the dividends associated with the specified ex-date.
      Throws:
      Exception - if an error occurs while fetching or processing the data, such as issues with the URL, data deserialization, or other runtime exceptions.

    • getPriority

      int getPriority()
      Returns the priority ranking of this split calendar connector. Lower numbers indicate higher priority - connectors with priority 1 are consulted before those with priority 2, etc.
      Returns:
      integer representing the priority of this connector (lower = higher priority)

    • supportISIN

      boolean supportISIN()
      Indicates whether this connector supports ISIN-based security identification.
      Returns:
      true if ISIN identification is supported, false otherwise
